/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wno-comment -Wno-reorder -Wno-unused-variable -Wtype-limits -std=c++14 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -march=native -mfpmath=sse -mavx2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX -DLV_HAVE_SSE -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE -Werror -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/chest_test_ul.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/chest_test_ul.dir/chest_test_ul.c.o -o chest_test_ul  ../../libsrsran_phy.a ../../../common/libsrsran_common.a ../../libsrsran_phy.a -lpthread -lm /usr/lib64/libfftw3f.so ../../../support/libsupport.a ../../../srslog/libsrslog.a /lib64/libmbedcrypto.so /usr/lib64/libdw.so
